sentences.english: Some couples choose to have their wedding on a weekday to save money.
sentences.korean: 돈을 아끼려고 평일에 결혼하는 커플이 있습니다.

sentences.english: Do you think this is a good idea?
I think having a weekday wedding is a smart choice for budget-conscious couples.
sentences.korean: 예산을 의식하는 커플에게 평일 결혼식은 현명한 선택이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Wedding venues typically charge thirty to fifty percent less on weekdays compared to Saturdays.
sentences.korean: 결혼식장은 보통 토요일에 비해 평일에 30~50% 적게 청구해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Festival or Event You Attended

sentences.english: That saved money could be used for the honeymoon or a down payment on a house.
sentences.korean: 절약한 돈은 신혼여행이나 집 계약금에 쓸 수 있어요.

sentences.english: The main drawback is that some guests may not be able to attend because they have to work.
sentences.korean: 주요 단점은 일부 하객이 일 때문에 참석하지 못할 수 있다는 거예요.

sentences.english: But ultimately the wedding is about the couple and their budget not about maximizing the guest count.
sentences.korean: 하지만 궁극적으로 결혼식은 커플과 예산에 관한 것이지 하객 수를 최대화하는 것이 아니에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
